overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The character follows a pedestrian along a wide sidewalk beneath elevated highways, transitioning from sunlit streets into a shaded underpass area before crossing a busy intersection. The scene features distinctive cyberpunk architecture with neon signage, palm trees, and massive concrete infrastructure.

events.description: exits narrow alleyway into wide open sidewalk alongside multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: following two pedestrians through a narrow corridor between commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: adult pedestrian in blue jacket walking ahead of ego
child pedestrian walking alongside the adult

entered.detail: tall modern building with glass facade and metal shutters on ground floor
curved concrete highway ramp with green-tinted barriers
elevated train track running overhead through the cityscape
tall skyscraper covered in digital advertisements and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow alley between commercial buildings with a bright neon sign visible in the distance. The camera follows two pedestrians as they emerge from the confined space into a wide urban sidewalk, revealing an expansive view of elevated highways and a distant tower covered in digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide pedestrian sidewalk alongside elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide sidewalk approaching a large orange structural arch

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket maintaining steady pace ahead of ego

entered.detail: massive orange portal-like structure supporting the overhead highway
tall palm trees lining the right side of the walkway
temporary red and white striped barriers blocking off a building entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit sidewalk beneath elevated highways, the scene features a distinctive orange structural arch ahead that frames the path forward. Palm trees and construction barriers line the right side while vehicles move along the road to the left, and the camera steadily approaches the underpass entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza under highway overpass

events.description: enters shadow of overpass, transitioning from bright sunlight to shaded artificial lighting
passes under the orange arch into the covered underpass area

agents.ego_description: walking into the shaded underpass area, passing pedestrians sitting on benches

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting on concrete bench using a handheld device

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with green neon accent lighting and embedded fixtures
illuminated advertisement screen showing a person's face
large potted plants placed along the walkway under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character passes under the massive orange arch into a shaded underpass plaza. The lighting shifts dramatically to a darker environment with green neon accents on the ceiling. Potted plants and benches line the walkway where pedestrians rest, and digital billboards illuminate the right side of the path.

events.description: approaches and begins crossing the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk and crossing the street with a group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past the crosswalk on the left side
group of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk then crossing together

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow parallel stripes
large illuminated advertisement on building wall showing a male figure

segments.scene_description: Walking through the underpass toward a street intersection, the scene opens to reveal a yellow-striped crosswalk. The character joins a crowd of pedestrians crossing the street while vehicles pass by on the left. Large digital billboards illuminate the right side as the camera moves from the shaded underpass toward the sunlit crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined urban alleyway into a sprawling, sunlit city intersection. It begins by following two pedestrians as they emerge from a narrow commercial corridor into a wide sidewalk, revealing a vista of elevated highways and a distant tower draped in digital billboards. As the camera moves forward along the sunlit path, it passes palm trees and construction barriers before approaching a massive orange structural arch. The scene then shifts dramatically into a shaded underpass plaza, where the bright daylight gives way to a darker environment accented by green neon ceiling lights and glowing billboards. Finally, the camera exits the shaded walkway and opens onto a busy street intersection, joining a crowd of pedestrians at a yellow-striped crosswalk under the return of the bright city sun.
